title: lithocardium calocephalum
intro: Lithocardium calocephalum, also known as Lithospermum calocephalum, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is often used in herbal medicine, particularly for its diuretic and expectorant properties, which help to remove excess fluid from the body and relieve respiratory congestion. The health benefits of Lithocardium calocephalum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Lithocardium calocephalum can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal preparations.
